headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .167 / .333 / .250.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the Seattle Mariners, KC 5, SEA 0. Stephen Kolek led the night, working 9.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 2 strikeouts and 1 walk. Maikel Garcia supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.0 mph.

player_of_game.name: Stephen Kolek
player_of_game.reason: worked 9.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 2 strikeouts and 1 walk.
